final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input din,
  output reg dout,
  input reset_n
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (~reset_n) begin
      dout <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
      dout <= din;
    end
  end

endmodule
